examples: The lawyer looked impassively at him and said nothing.
He watched impassively as his house burned down.
Faceless onlookers watch Lincoln impassively through a glass window.
Bearded men, squatting together in the pale afternoon sun, stare impassively as the FC goes by.
Basebya wore a pink jacket, black trousers and sat impassively during the sentencing, the AFP news agency reported.
